title: Franky Is Targeted
description: Franky is forced into the center of the conflict as CP9 targets both him and Iceburg for the ancient weapon blueprints.
scene: Across pages 17, 19, 21, 22, this part follows Iceburg, Nico Robin, Franky, Chopper, Rob Lucci. Franky is forced into the center of the conflict as CP9 targets both him and Iceburg for the ancient weapon blueprints.
summary: Franky is forced into the center of the conflict as CP9 targets both him and Iceburg for the ancient weapon blueprints.
